message:
test(btrfs): add smoke tests for parsing btrfs structures

Added 77 lines of unit tests for btrfs structure parsing:
- parse_root_item_smoke: Validates root item bytenr and level extraction
- parse_inode_item_smoke: Tests inode parsing with size, mode, nlink, timestamps
- parse_dir_items_smoke: Verifies directory entry parsing with objectid,
  file type, and name extraction
- parse_extent_data_regular_smoke: Tests regular extent parsing with disk
  bytenr and num_bytes

Each test constructs minimal valid byte arrays and verifies parser output
matches expected values, ensuring parser correctness without full disk images.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
